patch.value: pm schema add-status: register custom statuses (complement to add-type)
schema/statuses.json is loaded at runtime but there is no add-status command; users hand-edit JSON to add review/pending_approval/wont_fix.
pm schema add-status <id> --role <active|blocked|terminal_done|terminal_canceled> --alias --description writes statuses.json; role-validated; idempotent; surfaced by schema list; MCP+contracts+tests.
